_readme: This is settings.example.json — a portable template for ~/.claude/settings.json.
Copy relevant blocks into your own settings.json. Do not copy this file directly.
Personal paths (hooks, additionalDirectories) must match YOUR system.
Caveman hooks (SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit) are installed automatically by caveman.
See README.md for full setup instructions.

hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const f=(d.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(!f.endsWith('.py'))process.exit(0);const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const r=spawnSync('python3',['-m','py_compile',f],{encoding:'utf8'});console.log(r.status===0?'✓ '+f+' syntax OK':'⚠️  SYNTAX WARNING: '+f+' has errors — verify before committing');"
